title: coreopsis parviceps
intro: Coreopsis parviceps, also known as Dwarf Coreopsis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis parviceps include relief from menstrual cramps, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions. Coreopsis parviceps can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
